title: stachys pseudohumifusa
intro: Stachys pseudohumifusa, also known as Pseudohumulus or Korean Lamb's Ear, is a plant species belonging to the mint family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stachys pseudohumifusa include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
